blocks.content: em3k uses a block-based content system similar to modern website builders like WordPress. Each page is composed of individual blocks that can contain different types of content.

blocks.alt: Example of a block-based page layout showing different content blocks stacked vertically
blocks.caption: Example of a block-based page layout

blocks.content: Text Blocks: Paragraphs with basic formatting (bold, italic, links)
Image Blocks: Single images with optional captions
Video Blocks: Embedded videos with responsive aspect ratios
Spacer Blocks: Creates a blank space between blocks
List Blocks: Creates a grouped list of items
Callout Blocks: Highlights important information with tip, warning, note, or danger variants
Table Blocks: Displays tabular data with optional striping, borders, and hover effects
